f_isIntegral_iff (R : Type*) [CommRing R] {A : Type*} [CommRing A] [Algebra R A] :
    IsDominant (algebraMap R A) ↔ A ≃ₐ[R] A ∧ IsIntegral R A := by
  have hImplementation : IsDominant (algebraMap R A) ↔ A ≃ₐ[R] A ∧ IsIntegral R A := by
    constructor
    · -- Prove the forward direction: if `IsDominant (algebraMap R A)`, then `A ≃ₐ[R] A ∧ IsIntegral R A`
      intro h
      have h₁ : IsIntegral R A := by
        -- Since `algebraMap R A` is dominant, `A` is integral over `R`
        have h₂ : IsIntegral R A := by
          -- Use the fact that a dominant homomorphism implies integrality
          apply inferInstance
        exact h₂
      have h₂ : A ≃ₐ[R] A := by
        -- The identity map is an isomorphism of `R`-algebras
        refine' AlgEquiv.refl _
      exact ⟨h₂, h₁⟩
    · -- Prove the reverse direction: if `A ≃ₐ[R] A ∧ IsIntegral R A`, then `IsDominant (algebraMap R A)`
      intro h
      have h₁ : A ≃ₐ[R] A := h.1
      have h₂ : IsIntegral R A := h.2
      -- Since `A` is integral over `R`, the map `algebraMap R A` is dominant
      have h₃ : IsDominant (algebraMap R A) := by
        -- Use the fact that an integral homomorphism is dominant
        have h₄ : IsDominant (algebraMap R A) := by
          -- Use the property of integral extensions
          have h₅ : IsIntegral R A := h₂
          -- Apply the relevant lemma or property to conclude dominance
          have h₆ : IsDominant (algebraMap R A) := by
            apply inferInstance
          exact h₆
        exact h₄
      exact h₃
  
  exact hImplementation

haveI := classical.decEq 𝕜
    haveI := classical.decEq M
    -- Define the image of the ring homomorphism as a subring
    let img := RingHom.range (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainRingHom 𝕜 (embedding M))
    -- Obtain the structure of an integral domain from the subring
    have img_domain := Subring.instIsDomainSubtype
    -- Show that the image is an integral domain
    have hDomain : IsDomain (↥img) := inferInstance
    -- Use the fact that the ring is integral to prove dominance
    have hIntegral : IsIntegral (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M) (↥img) := by
      apply isIntegral_of_finite
      exact Module.finite_of_finite_rank
        (by simpa using (embedding_finrank : Module.rank 𝕜 (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M) = NatCast.cast (Fintype.card Fin (dim M))))
    -- Use the integral property to establish dominance
    have hDominant : IsDominant (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainRingHom 𝕜 (embedding M)) := by
      -- Use the fact that the image is an integral domain and the map is injective to establish dominance
      have hIsInjective : Function.Injective (AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomainRingHom 𝕜 (embedding M)) := by
        -- Prove that the map is injective
        have h : Function.Injective (AlgebraMap.of (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M) _) := by
          -- Use the properties of the embedding to prove injectivity
          exact injective_of_fg_works
        simpa using h
      -- Use the injectivity to establish dominance
      exact IsDominant.of_injective hIsInjective (by simpa using inferInstance)
    -- Conclude the proof by showing dominance
    simpa using hDominant
